final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI concepts, hand-drawn style, with illustrations and text (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "hand-drawn" educational infographic aesthetic — references in the spirit of sketchnote visual culture, IKEA assembly guide illustration tradition, Kurzgesagt (science explainer flat illustration); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must show concept relationships as connected diagram or flow, with clear hierarchy between parent and child concepts
Subject: must include all 7 concepts: AI / MCP / AI Agent / OpenClaw / AI Skill / 蒸馏 / CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, easy-to-understand atmosphere — exact visual tone is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn surface treatment — exact sketch texture / marker weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels: "AI" / "MCP" / "AI Agent" / "OpenClaw" / "AI Skill" / "蒸馏" / "CLI"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve all 7 concept terms in their original form; relationships between concepts must be visually clear
Avoid:
